text: I feel a sense of quiet anticipation here. The dim light, reflective glass, and silent hallways remind me of how spaces transform when emptied of people, fostering introspection about presence, utility, and the passing of time. Entering the next room, the playful colors and talk of "R+D" hint at curiosity and innovation, yet the stillness and the faint light offer a solemn counterpoint. I am both participant and observer, aware of my consciousness as something that connects the material and immaterial worlds.
